lsof_sample: COMMAND     PID        USER   FD   TYPE             DEVICE SIZE/OFF NODE NAME

reset_actions: did not apply new data mutations

stocks_in_play_engine.expected_role: Maintains ranked stocks-in-play universe for intelligence and prep flows.

signal_generation_engine.expected_role: Produces trade signal records consumed by setup/outcome lifecycle.

intelligence_decision_engine.expected_role: Builds per-symbol decision objects including why_moving, execution, and score.

calibration_trust_layer.expected_role: Applies truth filters and quality calibration to avoid score-only false positives.

prep_watchlist_layer.expected_role: Builds prep-mode watchlist and reason distribution for premarket planning.

earnings_signal_injection_layer.expected_role: Links earnings events into signals/setups/decisions for catalyst-aware planning.

news_ingestion_layer.expected_role: Ingests and symbol-links recent news for catalysts and explainability.

mcp_narrative_engine.expected_role: Provides symbol-level narrative/explanation for trader context and AI assistance.

systemGuard.expected_role: Blocks writes or alerts when lifecycle/validation invariants fail.

validation_build_guard.expected_role: Runs schema/data/endpoint checks to gate unsafe operation states.

decision_view.definition_sample:
WITH latest_mm AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON ((upper(m.symbol))) upper(m.symbol) AS symbol_key,
            m.symbol,
            m.price,
            m.gap_percent,
            m.relative_volume,
            m.atr,
            m.rsi,
            m.vwap,
            m.float_rotation,
            m.last_updated,
            m.change_percent,
            m.avg_volume_30d,
            m.updated_at,
            m.volume,
            m.previous_high,
            m.float_shares,
            m.atr_

notes: Sunday allowance applied: low live signal flow is acceptable.
